ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the cryptocurrency */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the cryptocurrency by market capitalization */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "available_supply" REAL /* Available supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* The official website URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* The URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date when the cryptocurrency was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency the data pertains to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the data */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "market_cap_usd" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "percent_change_1h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last hour */,
  "percent_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "percent_change_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 7 days */,
  "volume_btc" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume of the cryptocurrency in Bitcoin */,
  "volume_eth" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume of the cryptocurrency in Ethereum */,
  "price_btc" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency in Bitcoin */,
  "price_eth" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency in Ethereum */,
  "high_24h" REAL /* The highest price of the cryptocurrency in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_24h" REAL /* The lowest price of the cryptocurrency in the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the preference */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency for which preferences are set */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold price for sending alerts */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which alerts should be sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency the record pertains to */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the price was recorded */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in USD at that time */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency in USD at that time */,
  "high_price_usd" REAL /* The highest price of the cryptocurrency in USD for the recorded period */,
  "low_price_usd" REAL /* The lowest price of the cryptocurrency in USD for the recorded period */,
  "open_price_usd" REAL /* The opening price of the cryptocurrency in USD for the recorded period */,
  "close_price_usd" REAL /* The closing price of the cryptocurrency in USD for the recorded period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who triggered the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency associated with the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* The status of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* The value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the alert was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "base_crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the base cryptocurrency */,
  "quote_crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quote cryptocurrency */,
  "current_price_usd" REAL /* Current price of the trading pair in USD */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume of the trading pair in USD */,
  "price_change_1h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last hour */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "price_change_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 7 days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_quote_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_base_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the base currency */,
  "target_currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate from base to target currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update for the exchange rate */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* 24-hour trading volume of the exchange rate in USD */,
  "price_change_1h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last hour */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "price_change_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 7 days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_target_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_currency_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)
